items.summary: Add the uploaded product images as static frontend assets and use them as the product images in the Products section: set the 100gm product image to the uploaded file “100gm Front.jpg” and set the 200gm product image to the uploaded file “200gm Front.jpg”, replacing the current placeholder/generated image paths.

Remove the physical address from all displayed company contact details across the site UI (e.g., remove the Address card/Map link from the Contact section and remove the address lines from the Footer contact area), while keeping the email and phone/WhatsApp details.
